prompt: Incident 4821 concerns a queue worker that reconnects under the same logical worker ID during routine process replacement. When the delayed disconnect callback from the old socket finally arrives, one old in-flight task should become pending, but operators also see a task already leased to the replacement become pending and the replacement vanish from the active registry. In a few traces, an acknowledgement from the retired process is accepted for work delivered after the reconnect. Workers with different IDs remain isolated, and a connect/assign/disconnect cycle without replacement is healthy. Heartbeat jitter was suspected, although the reproduction below has no clocks or threads. Preserve at-least-once redelivery for work held by the disconnected process, allow independent workers to progress, and keep the existing public API.

repo_files.tests/test_public.py:
from lease_runtime.coordinator import WorkerCoordinator
from lease_runtime.registry import LeaseRegistry
from lease_runtime.task_queue import TaskQueue


def make_system():
    registry = LeaseRegistry()
    queue = TaskQueue()
    return registry, queue, WorkerCoordinator(registry, queue)


def test_disconnect_isolated_from_a_different_worker():
    registry, queue, coordinator = make_system()
    alpha = coordinator.connect("alpha")
    beta = coordinator.connect("beta")
    queue.add("a-job", {"kind": "index"})
    queue.add("b-job", {"kind": "email"})
    assert coordinator.assign("a-job", alpha)
    assert coordinator.assign("b-job", beta)

    assert coordinator.disconnect(alpha) == 1

    assert queue.get("a-job").state == "pending"
    assert queue.get("b-job").state == "leased"
    assert registry.is_active(beta)
    assert coordinator.complete("b-job", beta)


def test_replacement_can_finish_new_work_before_old_socket_closes():
    registry, queue, coordinator = make_system()
    original = coordinator.connect("worker-7")
    previous, replacement = coordinator.replace("worker-7")
    assert previous == original
    queue.add("fresh", {"version": 2})
    assert coordinator.assign("fresh", replacement)
    assert coordinator.complete("fresh", replacement)
    assert queue.get("fresh").state == "done"
    assert registry.is_active(replacement)
